channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Black hole winds may strip giant galaxies of future stars
item.description: Astronomers may be solving a cosmic mystery: why some of the universe's largest galaxies have far fewer stars than expected.

item.title: Scientists discover an earthquake gate as California faults reach highest stress in 1,000 years
item.description: A new study finds Southern California's major fault system is more stressed than at any point in the last 1,000 years. Researchers found that the C...

item.title: Ancient DNA shows plague was killing humans 5,500 years ago
item.description: Plague was a deadly threat 5,500 years ago, long before cities or rats were associated with outbreaks.

item.title: Could cosmic memory explain dark matter, dark energy, and black holes?
item.description: A new theory suggests the universe records its own history in spacetime, which might solve mysteries about dark matter and black holes.
